nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lesser ground robin
nodes.summary: The lesser ground robin (Amalocichla incerta) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae. It is found in New Guinea. Description It is 15 cm long and is dark brown with paler underparts and a white throat. Mating and nesting It nests on the ground or in low tree hollows. References
nodes.shortSummary: The lesser ground robin (Amalocichla incerta) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae. It is found in New Guinea.

nodes.name: 托馬索·薩爾瓦多里
nodes.summary: 托馬索·薩爾瓦多里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括黑尾鹇、Papuan mountain pigeon、Papuan spinetail等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Amalocichla
nodes.summary: Amalocichla（Amalocichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Lesser ground robin、Greater ground robin。
